name: Fried Green Tomatoes and Cucumber Slices
recipeIngredient: 2 large green tomatoes, sliced 1/2 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the green tomatoes about 1/2 inch thick.
2. Peel one large yellow cucumber and slice it, removing seeds.
3. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Dip the tomato and cucumber slices in evaporated milk, then in the oats (rubbing the oats between your hands to make them fine).
5. Fry slowly in hot oil until brown and tender.
